scripts.docker:up:redis: cd redis && docker --context desktop-linux compose up -d
scripts.docker:up:ollama: cd ollama && docker --context desktop-linux compose up -d
scripts.pm2:start:api: pm2 start cmd --interpreter none --name api-nest --cwd ./api-nest -- /d /s /c npm run start:dev
scripts.pm2:start:webapp: pm2 start cmd --interpreter none --name webapp --cwd ./webapp -- /d /s /c npm run dev
scripts.pm2:start:services: npm run pm2:start:api && npm run pm2:start:webapp
scripts.pm2:start:all: npm run sync:env && npm run docker:pull:ollama && npm run docker:pull:redis && npm run docker:up:redis && npm run docker:up:ollama && npm run pm2:start:services
scripts.build: npm run api-nest:build && npm run webapp:build && npm run electron:build && npm run electron:rebuild
